creator: _jkrow
caption:
💵 Comment INSIDER and I’ll send you a free 1-year @founderscard trial with 200+ travel perks + a discount on the Elite upgrade in the first week! ✈️ 

There’s an entire side of travel you probably didn’t know existed…

If you ever feel like you’re paying full price for travel while everyone else is getting upgrades, perks and VIP treatment, this is for you. 

One of the most underrated travel hacks is a FoundersCard membership that gives you direct access to tons of travel perks like hotel upgrades, discounts on airfareand exclusive travel discounts (without needing to sign up for another credit card). 

If you’re a frequent traveler, the savings can easily add up to hundreds or even thousands of dollars per year!
(ad)

transcription.text: Jackie believed that travel perks required approximately 17 credit cards and a very complicated spreadsheet. Airport lounges, hotel upgrades, automatic loyalty status, the mysterious things frequent travelers somehow always seem to have and never seem to explain. Then Jackie learned something she wished someone had told her approximately five years ago. None of it required a single credit card. Founder's Card is not a credit card, it is a membership. Through Founder's Card, Jackie unlocks automatic loyalty status at the world's top hotel chains, preferred rates across 18 global airlines, complementary upgrades on rental cars, discounts on airport lounges, premium cruises and VIP experiences that don't show up on any public booking site. There are over 200 perks. Jackie would have preferred to receive this information sooner. She has, however, decided to pass it along. Comment Insider below. Jackie will send you a free 12-month preview membership with access to over 200 of these perks.
